overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character walking through a foggy morning at a rural ranch. The character passes a large log cabin, encounters an NPC carrying goods, and continues toward a horse corral with mountains visible through the mist.

weathered wooden barrels near the house porch

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path toward a large two-story log cabin in a foggy rural setting. An NPC carrying a large sack passes by from right to left. The misty mountains are visible in the background, and wooden barrels sit near the house porch.

horse corral with white horses becomes visible on the right

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the log cabin into more open ranch land. A covered wagon sits in the distance while a wooden horse corral becomes visible on the right. The fog continues to obscure the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: horse corral and fenced pasture area

events.description: approaching the wooden gate of the horse corral where horses are grazing

entered.detail: wooden gate structure at the corral entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks alongside a wooden horse corral containing several white horses. The fence moves from the far right to near right as the character progresses. A wooden gate structure is visible ahead at the corral entrance, with misty mountains and ranch buildings in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy rural ranch that transitions from the vicinity of a residential cabin to an open horse corral. It begins on a dirt path leading toward a large two-story log cabin, where an NPC carrying a large sack passes by against a backdrop of misty mountains and barrels on a porch. As the character moves past the house, the scene opens into wider ranch land, revealing a distant covered wagon while a wooden horse corral emerges on the right. The camera then progresses alongside the corral fence, passing several white horses as the perspective shifts toward a wooden gate structure. Finally, the shot settles on the corral entrance with the ranch buildings and obscured mountains lingering in the hazy distance.
